name: Broccoli Cheese Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Semi-cook the broccoli according to package directions.
2. Cube the cheeses (Muenster, mozzarella, and cheddar).
3. In the bottom of the pie shells, arrange the broccoli and cheeses.
4. Mix the eggs and whipping cream until foamy.
5. Pour the egg mixture into the pie shells.
6. Bake at 375°F for 30 minutes.
By "Diane Geary"  on Feb 22, 1998.
